title: vulpia eriolepis
intro: Vulpia eriolepis, also known as Squirreltail Fescue, is a species of grass native to North America. It is a perennial grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, colds, and fever, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. Vulpia eriolepis can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote lung health and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
